description:
## Question

How is the reference's /superwhisper on|off|toggle skill expressed in this repo's declarative skill system?

The reference skill writes /tmp/superwhisper-agent/disabled-<md5(pwd)> to disable per-project. Decide:
- Where it lives: home-modules/claude-skills.nix (this repo's curated skillset; note disableBundledSkills=true).
- Whether the flag actually gates hook behavior (depends on ticket 1's finding) or is purely a statusline display toggle — and whether that changes whether the skill is worth porting.
- The exact flag path/convention to standardize on, since the statusline indicator (ticket 5) must read the same convention.

HITL prototype/grilling.
title: Design the per-project SuperWhisper toggle skill port
